home.hero.title: Lightweight, Secure, Cross-Platform Instant Messaging
home.hero.lead: A clean interface focused on information hierarchy and readability, prioritizing conversation experience with offline messages, group chats, and smart Agent streaming integration
home.hero.highlight2Sub: Clean layout, comfortable spacing, smooth interactions
home.demo.title: 🤖 Smart Chat Assistant
home.demo.userMessage: Summarize my unread messages from today
home.features.title: Core Features
home.features.feature1Desc: Supports one-on-one, groups, and rooms with message persistence and offline sync.
home.features.feature2Desc: Compact protocol stack using binary Protobuf for efficient and secure communication.
home.features.feature3Desc: Built-in Agent endpoint with streaming responses and real-time interaction.
home.downloads.title: Downloads
home.downloads.note: For all installers, visit GitHub Release
home.whyChoose.title: Why ChatLite
home.whyChoose.lead: Not just another chat app. ChatLite is redesigned from the ground up for those who truly care about communication quality
home.whyChoose.point1Sub: Based on Protobuf + WebSocket, message payload is 45% smaller than JSON, smooth even on weak networks.
home.whyChoose.point2Sub: Messages never lost. Auto-pull history on device switch, so important conversations are always there.
home.whyChoose.point3Sub: Group chat summaries, auto-replies, message search — more than chat, a productivity tool.
home.whyChoose.point4Sub: Server-side persistent storage with offline pull. Auto-syncs message history across devices.
home.whyChoose.point5Sub: Native clients for Windows, macOS, Linux, plus web — seamless switching between devices.
home.whyChoose.point6Sub: Fully open source with one-click Docker deployment. Private messaging for your team.
reward.title: Support the Developer
reward.note: Thank you for your support — it keeps me improving the software!
